name: OIDC RBAC
description: Advanced OIDC authentication with role-based library access control
overview: OpenID Connect SSO with role-to-library mapping, multi-provider support, and admin UI.

versions.changelog:
Fix new-user login 500 and persist role mappings

Re-fetch a fresh user copy and retry on optimistic-concurrency conflict so
new-user provisioning no longer fails with DbUpdateConcurrencyException.

Persist role mappings (admin flag, permissions, per-role library access) via
IUserManager.UpdatePolicyAsync instead of UpdateUserAsync, which only saved
the root User row and silently dropped child Permission/Preference changes —
leaving users with access to all libraries.
